Aunt Jeanette's Uncooked Fridge Cookies

Beth Germick

Prep time -

Cook time -

Yield: 76 pieces

Ingredients

  • 1 cup sugar
  • 1 cup brown sugar
  • 1/2 cup milk
  • 1 stick of butter
  • 1 cup chocolate bits
  • 2 cups quick oats
  • 1 cup chopped nuts
  • 1 tsp vanilla

Directions

  1. Combine sugars, milk, and butter in saucepan. Bring to a boil. Cook 2 minutes, stirring constantly. Remove from heat.
  2. Add remaining ingredients. Drop by rounded teaspoons onto waxed paper.
